split_boundaries.responsibility: factory brief, plan, gate, packet, and validation models
GoalRun, resume, once, AO2 workcell execution
split_boundaries.guard: dry-run, cancellation, rollback, and no-provider defaults
intent-only defaults, path safety, and explicit credentials prohibition

split_boundaries.responsibility: workcell state, concurrent workcell runner, AO2 and repair workcells
split_boundaries.guard: single-run ownership, kill switch, and no hidden concurrency

split_boundaries.responsibility: init, packet, contract, and live-docs gates
GoalRun transitions, evidence verification, retention, and cleanup
split_boundaries.guard: GoalRun state machine and evidence digest tests

split_boundaries.responsibility: artifact checksums, release candidate, production readiness

split_boundaries.guard: release/deploy/publish prohibition and explicit operator approval

overlap_risks: Forge GoalRun overlaps AO2 runtime lifecycle and should not become a second execution authority
workcell concurrency and AO2 execution are adjacent to safety gates and require characterization before extraction
control-plane upload/readback code must remain outside the planning-only Atlas node
refactor_order: leave release preview isolated until contract registry is stable
non_goals: do not execute Forge live runs
do not widen policy or auth
do not claim Forge is a production orchestrator
